tasks.title: Codebase Refactoring and Cleanup
tasks.description: Resolve merge conflicts, remove dead code/stubs, implement centralized logging, run depcheck, clean directories, and organize AI configs
tasks.details: 1. Resolve merge conflicts in profile/page.tsx, StatsOverview.tsx, EvolutionChart.tsx, PositionStats.tsx using git mergetool. 2. Remove 501 stub routes (tournament/create, discovery/insert-manual) or implement minimally. 3. Create src/lib/logger.ts with Winston: `npm i winston`, implement logger.error/replace console.error. 4. Run `npx depcheck --ignores='@types/*,eslint*'`, remove unused deps. 5. Remove material-symbols from package.json. 6. Add ./~/, coverage/, dist/ to .gitignore. 7. Consolidate AI configs to docs/ai-tools/, keep CLAUDE.md as SSOT. 8. Extract stateful logic from 7 admin tab panels to custom hooks (useState/useEffect). 9. Add npm script 'gen:types': 'supabase gen types typescript --local > src/types/database.ts'. 10. Run naming audit with ESLint naming rules.
tasks.testStrategy: Run `npm run build`, `npm test`, verify no console.error in browser devtools, check bundle size reduction, validate types with `tsc --noEmit`, test logger with unit test: expect(logger.error('test')).toBeCalled()

subtasks.title: Resolve merge conflicts in profile and stats components
subtasks.description: Manually resolve merge conflicts in profile/page.tsx, StatsOverview.tsx, EvolutionChart.tsx, and PositionStats.tsx files using git mergetool
subtasks.details: Use `git mergetool` to open each conflicted file and manually resolve conflicts by choosing appropriate code sections. Ensure all imports, component logic, and TypeScript types are preserved correctly. Test each component after resolution to ensure functionality is maintained.
subtasks.testStrategy: After resolution, run `npm run build` and `npm test` to ensure no compilation errors. Manually test each affected component in browser to verify UI renders correctly and no runtime errors occur.

subtasks.title: Remove or implement 501 stub routes
subtasks.description: Evaluate and either remove tournament/create and discovery/insert-manual stub routes or implement minimal functionality
subtasks.details: Analyze the 501 stub routes (tournament/create, discovery/insert-manual) to determine if they should be removed entirely or implemented with minimal functionality. If removing, clean up any references in navigation, links, or routing configuration. If implementing, create basic placeholder pages with proper error handling.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test all navigation paths to ensure removed routes don't cause 404 errors. If implemented minimally, verify routes return appropriate responses and don't break application flow. Check for any dead links in the UI.

subtasks.title: Install Winston and create centralized logger
subtasks.description: Install Winston logging library and create src/lib/logger.ts with centralized logging functionality
subtasks.details: Run `npm install winston` to add the logging library. Create src/lib/logger.ts with Winston configuration including different log levels (error, warn, info, debug). Set up file and console transports with appropriate formatting. Export logger instance with methods like logger.error, logger.warn, etc.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create unit test to verify logger.error method is called correctly. Test logger configuration by running sample log statements and checking output format. Verify log files are created in expected location.

subtasks.title: Replace console.error with Winston logger
subtasks.description: Find and replace all console.error statements throughout the codebase with the new Winston logger
subtasks.details: Search codebase for all instances of console.error and replace with logger.error from the centralized logger. Also replace console.warn, console.log where appropriate with logger.warn, logger.info. Ensure proper import statements are added to each file that uses the logger.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run global search to ensure no console.error statements remain. Test error scenarios in browser devtools to verify errors are properly logged. Check that logger import statements are correctly added to all modified files.

subtasks.title: Run dependency audit and remove unused packages
subtasks.description: Execute depcheck to identify unused dependencies and remove them, including material-symbols package
subtasks.details: Run `npx depcheck --ignores='@types/*,eslint*'` to identify unused dependencies. Review the output and safely remove packages that are not being used. Specifically remove material-symbols from package.json as mentioned. Update package-lock.json by running npm install after removals.
subtasks.testStrategy: After removing dependencies, run `npm run build` and `npm test` to ensure no build failures. Check that application still functions correctly in development and production modes. Verify bundle size reduction.

subtasks.title: Update .gitignore with additional exclusions
subtasks.description: Add ./~/, coverage/, and dist/ directories to .gitignore file to exclude them from version control
subtasks.details: Open .gitignore file and add the following entries: ./~/ (temporary files), coverage/ (test coverage reports), and dist/ (build output directory). Ensure proper formatting and that these additions don't conflict with existing entries.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that files in these directories are no longer tracked by git using `git status`. Test that build and test processes still work correctly and generate files in these directories without git tracking them.

subtasks.title: Consolidate AI configuration files
subtasks.description: Move all AI-related configuration files to docs/ai-tools/ directory and maintain CLAUDE.md as single source of truth
subtasks.details: Create docs/ai-tools/ directory if it doesn't exist. Move all AI configuration files (prompts, settings, documentation) into this centralized location. Ensure CLAUDE.md remains as the authoritative source of truth for AI tool configuration. Update any references to moved files.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all AI configuration files are properly organized in docs/ai-tools/. Check that CLAUDE.md contains comprehensive and up-to-date information. Ensure no broken references to moved configuration files exist.

subtasks.title: Extract stateful logic from admin panels to custom hooks
subtasks.description: Create custom hooks to extract useState and useEffect logic from 7 admin tab panels for better code organization
subtasks.details: Identify the 7 admin tab panels and extract their stateful logic (useState, useEffect, data fetching, form handling) into custom hooks. Create hooks like useAdminPanel, useUserManagement, etc. in src/hooks/ directory. Ensure proper TypeScript typing and error handling in the extracted hooks.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test each admin panel to ensure functionality remains unchanged after hook extraction. Verify that state management, side effects, and data flow work correctly. Run unit tests for the custom hooks to ensure they handle edge cases properly.

subtasks.title: Add Supabase type generation npm script
subtasks.description: Add npm script 'gen:types' to automatically generate TypeScript types from Supabase schema
subtasks.details: Add the following script to package.json: 'gen:types': 'supabase gen types typescript --local > src/types/database.ts'. This will generate TypeScript types from the local Supabase instance and save them to the specified file. Ensure the src/types/ directory exists.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run `npm run gen:types` to verify the script executes successfully and generates the database.ts file. Check that the generated types are valid TypeScript and can be imported in other files. Verify the types match the current database schema.

subtasks.title: Run ESLint naming audit and fix violations
subtasks.description: Execute comprehensive naming audit using ESLint naming rules and fix any violations found
subtasks.details: Configure ESLint with naming convention rules (camelCase for variables/functions, PascalCase for components/types, etc.). Run ESLint across the entire codebase to identify naming violations. Fix all violations to ensure consistent naming conventions throughout the project.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run `npm run lint` to verify no naming convention violations remain. Ensure all variable names, function names, component names, and file names follow established conventions. Run `npm run build` and `npm test` to confirm fixes don't break functionality.

subtasks.title: Resolve merge conflicts in profile/page.tsx
subtasks.description: Use git mergetool to resolve merge conflicts in the profile page component, ensuring proper component structure and functionality
subtasks.details: Run `git mergetool` on profile/page.tsx, manually resolve conflicts by choosing appropriate code sections, test component renders correctly, commit resolved file with descriptive message
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify profile page loads without errors, check component props and state management work correctly

subtasks.title: Resolve merge conflicts in StatsOverview.tsx, EvolutionChart.tsx, PositionStats.tsx
subtasks.description: Systematically resolve merge conflicts in the three statistics components using git mergetool
subtasks.details: Use git mergetool for each file individually, preserve data visualization logic, ensure chart rendering and stats calculations remain intact, test all components in isolation
subtasks.testStrategy: Load stats dashboard, verify charts render with sample data, check component props and data flow

subtasks.title: Implement stub route removal/implementation strategy
subtasks.description: Analyze and either remove or minimally implement the 501 stub routes for tournament/create and discovery/insert-manual
subtasks.details: Review tournament/create and discovery/insert-manual routes, decide removal vs minimal implementation based on product requirements, update routing configuration, remove unused imports and components
subtasks.testStrategy: Test route navigation returns appropriate responses, verify no broken links, check API endpoints return expected status codes

subtasks.title: Install Winston and create centralized logger
subtasks.description: Set up Winston logging library and create src/lib/logger.ts with centralized logging configuration
subtasks.details: Run `npm install winston`, create src/lib/logger.ts with Winston configuration, implement logger.error, logger.info, logger.warn methods, set up log levels and formatting
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test logger methods, verify log output format, test different log levels work correctly

subtasks.title: Replace console.error with Winston logger across codebase
subtasks.description: Find and replace all console.error instances with the new Winston logger.error method
subtasks.details: Search codebase for console.error usage, replace with logger.error imports and calls, ensure proper error context is maintained, update error handling patterns
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify no console.error calls remain in browser devtools, test error logging works in development and production modes

subtasks.title: Run dependency audit and cleanup unused packages
subtasks.description: Execute depcheck to identify and remove unused dependencies, specifically removing material-symbols
subtasks.details: Run `npx depcheck --ignores='@types/*,eslint*'`, review output for unused dependencies, remove material-symbols from package.json, clean up other unused packages, run npm install
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify build still passes after dependency removal, check bundle size reduction, ensure no missing dependency errors

subtasks.title: Update .gitignore with additional exclusions
subtasks.description: Add ./~/, coverage/, and dist/ directories to .gitignore to prevent tracking of temporary and build files
subtasks.details: Edit .gitignore file to add ./~/, coverage/, dist/ entries, ensure proper formatting and no conflicts with existing entries, test git status shows clean working directory
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify specified directories are ignored by git, check git status doesn't show unwanted files

subtasks.title: Consolidate AI configurations to docs/ai-tools/
subtasks.description: Move and organize all AI-related configuration files to docs/ai-tools/ directory with CLAUDE.md as single source of truth
subtasks.details: Create docs/ai-tools/ directory, move AI config files, ensure CLAUDE.md contains comprehensive AI tool documentation, remove duplicate configurations, update any references to moved files
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all AI configs are accessible in new location, check CLAUDE.md completeness, ensure no broken references

subtasks.title: Extract stateful logic from admin tab panels to custom hooks
subtasks.description: Refactor 7 admin tab panels by extracting useState and useEffect logic into reusable custom hooks
subtasks.details: Identify stateful logic in each of the 7 admin panels, create custom hooks (useAdminPanel, useTabState, etc.), extract useState and useEffect patterns, ensure proper hook dependencies and cleanup
subtasks.testStrategy: Test admin panels maintain same functionality, verify hooks are reusable, check for memory leaks and proper cleanup

subtasks.title: Setup type generation script and ESLint naming audit
subtasks.description: Add npm script for Supabase type generation and run ESLint naming rules audit across codebase
subtasks.details: Add 'gen:types': 'supabase gen types typescript --local > src/types/database.ts' to package.json scripts, configure ESLint naming rules, run naming audit, fix naming violations
subtasks.testStrategy: Run npm run gen:types successfully, verify generated types are valid, check ESLint naming rules pass, validate TypeScript compilation

tasks.title: Project Documentation Setup
tasks.description: Create CONTRIBUTING.md, DEVELOPMENT.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, API.md, DATABASE.md, GitHub templates, labels, milestone, and update README.md
tasks.details: 1. Create docs/ folder structure. 2. docs/CONTRIBUTING.md: Git workflow (branch-per-task, PR checklist), dev setup, testing reqs. 3. docs/DEVELOPMENT.md: Supabase local start, env vars, migrations, seed. 4. docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: Mermaid diagram of app flow, Supabase schema. 5. docs/API.md: Table of 40+ routes (method/path/params/response). 6. docs/DATABASE.md: Schema doc, ERD Mermaid, views list. 7. .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md + feature_request.md. 8. .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md with Phase 2 checklist. 9. GitHub labels: bug,feature,refactor,docs,redesign,phase-2. 10. Milestone 'Phase 2: Redesign'. 11. Update README.md with badges, quickstart, deploy links.

subtasks.title: Create docs/ folder structure
subtasks.description: Set up the documentation folder structure with proper organization for all documentation files
subtasks.details: Create docs/ directory in project root. Set up subdirectories if needed for organization. Ensure proper .gitkeep files or initial structure is in place for version control.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify docs/ folder exists and is properly structured in repository

subtasks.title: Create CONTRIBUTING.md with Git workflow
subtasks.description: Document contribution guidelines including Git workflow, branch-per-task strategy, and PR checklist requirements
subtasks.details: Create docs/CONTRIBUTING.md with sections for: Git workflow (branch-per-task methodology), development setup instructions, testing requirements, code style guidelines, and pull request checklist. Include examples of proper commit messages and branch naming conventions.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review document renders correctly in GitHub, validate all workflow steps are clear and actionable

subtasks.title: Create DEVELOPMENT.md with local setup
subtasks.description: Document local development environment setup including Supabase configuration and database management
subtasks.details: Create docs/DEVELOPMENT.md covering: Supabase local startup procedures, environment variable configuration, database migration processes, seed data setup, and troubleshooting common development issues. Include step-by-step setup instructions.

subtasks.details: Create docs/ARCHITECTURE.md with Mermaid diagrams illustrating: application flow architecture, component relationships, Supabase schema structure, and data flow patterns. Include both high-level system overview and detailed technical diagrams.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify Mermaid diagrams render correctly in GitHub and accurately represent current system architecture

subtasks.title: Create API.md route documentation
subtasks.description: Document all API routes with comprehensive table of methods, paths, parameters, and responses
subtasks.details: Create docs/API.md with detailed table documenting 40+ routes including: HTTP method, endpoint path, request parameters, response format, authentication requirements, and example usage. Organize by functional areas for easy navigation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Cross-reference documented routes with actual codebase to ensure completeness and accuracy

subtasks.title: Create DATABASE.md schema documentation

subtasks.details: Create docs/DATABASE.md including: complete schema documentation, ERD Mermaid diagrams, database views listing, table relationships, indexes, and constraints. Document data types, nullable fields, and business logic constraints.

subtasks.title: Create bug report template

subtasks.details: Create .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md with structured template including: bug description, steps to reproduce, expected vs actual behavior, environment details, screenshots section, and severity classification.

subtasks.title: Create feature request template

subtasks.title: Create PR template with Phase 2 checklist
subtasks.description: Set up pull request template with comprehensive checklist for Phase 2 development standards

subtasks.title: Create GitHub labels and milestone
subtasks.description: Set up GitHub repository labels and Phase 2 milestone for project organization

subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all labels are created with correct naming and milestone is properly configured

subtasks.title: Update README.md with badges and links

subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all badges display correctly, links are functional, and quickstart instructions work for new users

tasks.title: Visual Brainstorming and Design System Generation
tasks.description: Install UI/UX Pro Max skill, create design-refs/, generate MASTER.md with complete design system specs and page specs
tasks.details: 1. `npx skills add https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill --skill ui-ux-pro-max`. 2. Create design-refs/ with screenshots: VirtualNexusArena.com, 21st.dev, Dribbble esports dashboards. 3. Run UI/UX Pro Max skill targeting design-system/MASTER.md output. 4. MASTER.md sections: color palette (primary/secondary/accent/semantic), typography scale (fonts/weights/sizes), spacing scale (4px grid), component specs (button/card/modal/table/sidebar/navbar), anti-patterns. 5. Create design-system/pages/ with specs for profile.md, team.md, auth.md, etc. 6. Manual validation/adjustments. 7. Finalize primary color decision (blue/orange).
tasks.testStrategy: Validate MASTER.md completeness against checklist, screenshot specs match references, test color contrast with WAVE tool (WCAG AA), verify all pages have spec files

subtasks.title: Install and Configure UI/UX Pro Max Skill
subtasks.description: Install the UI/UX Pro Max skill package and verify proper configuration for design system generation
subtasks.details: Execute `npx skills add https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill --skill ui-ux-pro-max` command. Verify installation success, check for any configuration requirements or dependencies. Test basic skill functionality to ensure it's ready for design system generation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify skill installation with --version flag, test basic command execution, check for any error messages or missing dependencies

subtasks.title: Create Design References Collection
subtasks.description: Establish design-refs/ directory and collect visual references from target websites and design platforms
subtasks.details: Create design-refs/ directory structure. Capture high-quality screenshots from VirtualNexusArena.com, 21st.dev, and curated Dribbble esports dashboards. Organize screenshots by category (navigation, cards, forms, dashboards). Document key design patterns and visual elements for reference during system generation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all reference screenshots are captured and properly organized, ensure image quality is sufficient for design analysis

subtasks.title: Generate MASTER.md with Color Palette System
subtasks.description: Use UI/UX Pro Max skill to generate initial MASTER.md file focusing on comprehensive color palette definition
subtasks.details: Run UI/UX Pro Max skill targeting design-system/MASTER.md output. Focus on generating complete color palette section including primary, secondary, accent, and semantic colors. Include color codes, usage guidelines, and accessibility considerations. Establish foundation for blue vs orange primary color decision.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate MASTER.md file creation, verify color palette completeness, test color contrast ratios with WAVE tool for WCAG AA compliance

subtasks.title: Define Typography and Spacing Scale Systems
subtasks.description: Expand MASTER.md with comprehensive typography hierarchy and 4px-based spacing scale system
subtasks.details: Add typography scale section with font families, weights, and sizes for all text elements (page-title, section-title, body, etc.). Define 4px grid-based spacing scale for consistent layout. Include line heights, letter spacing, and responsive considerations. Integrate with design references for consistency.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify typography scale covers all use cases, validate spacing scale follows 4px grid system, check readability and hierarchy effectiveness

subtasks.title: Create Component Specifications
subtasks.description: Document comprehensive specifications for core UI components including states and variations
subtasks.details: Add detailed component specs to MASTER.md for button, card, modal, table, sidebar, and navbar components. Include all states (default, hover, active, disabled, loading, error). Define sizing variants, color applications, and interaction patterns. Document anti-patterns to avoid.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review component specs against design references, verify all states are documented, validate consistency with established color and typography systems

subtasks.title: Generate Page-Specific Design Specifications
subtasks.description: Create individual design specification files for each major page type in the application
subtasks.details: Create design-system/pages/ directory with detailed specs for profile.md, team.md, auth.md, and other key pages. Each spec should include layout structure, component usage, specific styling requirements, and responsive behavior. Reference MASTER.md tokens and components consistently.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all major pages have corresponding spec files, check consistency with MASTER.md system, validate completeness of layout and component specifications

subtasks.title: Manual Validation and System Finalization
subtasks.description: Conduct comprehensive design review, finalize color decisions, and complete anti-pattern documentation
subtasks.details: Perform manual review of entire design system for consistency and completeness. Make final decision on primary color (blue vs orange) based on brand alignment and accessibility. Complete anti-patterns section with specific examples. Conduct design review checkpoint and make necessary adjustments to ensure system cohesion.
subtasks.testStrategy: Complete design system checklist validation, verify WCAG AA compliance for final color choices, test system consistency across all specifications, validate against original requirements

tasks.title: Implement Design Tokens in CSS/Tailwind Config
tasks.description: Apply MASTER.md tokens to globals.css, tailwind.config.ts, layout.tsx, convert hardcoded styles to CSS variables
tasks.details: 1. Update src/app/globals.css: add --card-hover, --surface-1/2, --position-gk/def/mid/fwd/atk tokens from MASTER.md. 2. tailwind.config.ts: extend theme with typography scale (page-title, section-title, etc.), spacing scale. 3. src/app/layout.tsx: next/font/google for main font + Fira Code (.font-data utility). 4. Replace .nav-item-active #0d7ff2 → hsl(var(--primary)). 5. Replace .glass-sidebar rgba() → CSS var tokens. 6. Add focus-visible ring styles for WCAG. 7. Create tokens audit script to find remaining hardcoded values.
tasks.testStrategy: Run tokens audit script (0 hardcoded colors), Lighthouse accessibility 90+, keyboard navigation test (Tab/Enter/Esc), contrast check with browser devtools

subtasks.title: Define CSS Variables in globals.css
subtasks.description: Add semantic design tokens to globals.css including card-hover, surface variants, and position-specific color tokens from MASTER.md
subtasks.details: Update src/app/globals.css with CSS custom properties: --card-hover, --surface-1, --surface-2, --position-gk, --position-def, --position-mid, --position-fwd, --position-atk tokens. Organize tokens by category (colors, surfaces, positions) with proper HSL values from MASTER.md design system specification.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify CSS variables are properly defined and accessible in browser devtools, validate HSL color values match MASTER.md specification

subtasks.title: Extend Tailwind Config Typography Scale
subtasks.description: Configure typography scale in tailwind.config.ts with page-title, section-title, and other text variants from design system
subtasks.details: Extend tailwind.config.ts theme.fontSize with typography scale: page-title, section-title, body-large, body-small, caption variants. Map to CSS custom properties and include line-height values. Ensure proper font-weight mappings for each typography level.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test typography classes render correctly, verify font sizes and line heights match design specifications, check Tailwind IntelliSense autocomplete works

subtasks.title: Configure Tailwind Spacing Scale
subtasks.description: Add custom spacing scale to Tailwind config for consistent layout spacing throughout the application
subtasks.details: Extend tailwind.config.ts theme.spacing with design system spacing tokens. Add custom spacing values that align with 8px grid system. Include component-specific spacing like card padding, section gaps, and layout margins.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify spacing classes generate correctly, test spacing consistency across components, validate 8px grid alignment

subtasks.title: Setup Next.js Font Configuration
subtasks.description: Configure next/font/google for main font and Fira Code in layout.tsx with proper font utilities
subtasks.details: Update src/app/layout.tsx to import and configure Google Fonts using next/font/google. Setup main application font and Fira Code for code/data display. Create .font-data utility class for monospace content. Apply font variables to CSS custom properties for consistent usage.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify fonts load correctly, test .font-data utility class works, check font fallbacks, validate no layout shift during font loading

subtasks.title: Replace Hardcoded Colors with CSS Variables
subtasks.description: Systematically replace hardcoded color values like #0d7ff2 and rgba() values with CSS variable tokens
subtasks.details: Replace .nav-item-active #0d7ff2 with hsl(var(--primary)). Replace .glass-sidebar rgba() values with CSS variable tokens. Audit and replace other hardcoded colors throughout stylesheets. Update component styles to use semantic color tokens instead of literal values.
subtasks.testStrategy: Visual regression testing to ensure colors remain consistent, verify all hardcoded colors are replaced, test theme switching if applicable

subtasks.title: Implement WCAG Focus-Visible Ring Styles
subtasks.description: Add accessible focus-visible ring styles using design tokens for keyboard navigation compliance
subtasks.details: Create focus-visible ring styles using CSS custom properties for consistent focus indicators. Apply to interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs). Ensure WCAG AA contrast requirements are met. Use design system focus ring colors and implement proper focus management.
subtasks.testStrategy: Keyboard navigation testing with Tab/Enter/Esc keys, contrast analysis for focus rings, WCAG accessibility audit, test focus-visible vs focus behavior

subtasks.title: Create Token Audit Script and Validation

subtasks.details: Create Node.js script to scan CSS, TypeScript, and JSX files for hardcoded color values, font sizes, and spacing. Generate report of violations with file locations. Include validation for proper CSS variable usage and design token compliance. Add to package.json scripts for CI integration.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run audit script and verify 0 hardcoded colors detected, test script catches various hardcoded value patterns, validate script performance on large codebase
